title: Yuki's New Friend at School
synopsis: Yuki feels scared on her first day at a new school until she meets Pepper, a shy class rabbit who is also nervous. Through kindness and friendship, both Yuki and Pepper discover they can be brave together and find happiness in their new environment.

pages.text: Yuki held her mama's hand tight. Today was her first day at Rainbow Preschool. The big red door looked scary. "I don't want to go," Yuki whispered. She felt nervous butterflies in her tummy.

illustration.description: A small Japanese girl with shoulder-length black hair in pigtails stands hesitantly outside a bright red school door, holding hands with her mother who has kind brown eyes and wears a yellow cardigan. Yuki wears a blue backpack and purple dress, looking worried with wide dark eyes. The school building is cheerful yellow brick with colorful flower boxes under windows.
illustration.alt: Yuki looking nervous while holding her mother's hand outside the red school door

pages.text: Inside the classroom, children were playing everywhere. Marcus was building with blocks. Aria was painting at the easel. Everyone looked happy and busy. But Yuki felt sad and alone.

illustration.description: A bright classroom with construction paper textured walls in soft green. A Black boy with curly hair builds colorful blocks while a girl with braided hair and dark skin paints purple flowers at an easel. Other diverse children play in the background. Yuki stands near the doorway looking small and uncertain, her shoulders slightly hunched.
illustration.alt: Yuki feeling sad while watching other children play happily in the colorful classroom

pages.text: In the quiet corner sat a small white rabbit in a cozy cage. The nameplate said "Pepper." The bunny was hiding behind his water bowl. "He looks scared too," Yuki thought softly.

illustration.description: A fluffy white rabbit with pink ears and black button eyes huddles behind a blue water bowl in a clean cage with soft yellow bedding. Yuki kneels beside the cage, her face showing understanding and sympathy. The corner has soft lighting and feels peaceful compared to the busy classroom behind them.
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering Pepper the rabbit hiding nervously in his cage

pages.text: "Hello, Pepper," Yuki whispered gently. She put her finger near the cage. Pepper's pink nose twitched. Slowly, very slowly, he hopped closer. Yuki felt a little less scared.

illustration.description: Yuki's small finger touches the cage bars as Pepper cautiously approaches with his pink nose extended toward her. Both characters show curiosity overcoming fear - Yuki's eyes are softer now, and Pepper's ears are perked up with interest. Warm golden light filters through the scene.
illustration.alt: Yuki and Pepper cautiously making their first connection through the cage bars

pages.text: Ms. Chen, their teacher with kind eyes and a warm smile, helped Yuki hold Pepper safely. "He likes you," she said. Pepper felt soft and warm. Yuki felt brave holding her new friend.

illustration.description: A gentle Asian teacher with short black hair and a coral-colored sweater helps Yuki hold Pepper properly. Yuki sits cross-legged, cradling the content white rabbit who looks relaxed in her arms. Ms. Chen smiles warmly, and Yuki's expression shows growing confidence and joy. The background is soft blue-green.
illustration.alt: Ms. Chen helping Yuki hold Pepper safely, both looking happy and comfortable

pages.text: Soon other children came to pet Pepper too. "He's so soft!" said Marcus. "Can I hold him next?" asked Aria. Yuki felt happy sharing her friend. School wasn't scary anymore!

illustration.description: A circle of diverse children sitting on a colorful rainbow rug, all gently petting Pepper who sits contentedly in the center. Yuki beams with pride and happiness, no longer the scared girl from earlier. Marcus and Aria smile widely, and other children of various ethnicities watch with delight. The scene radiates warmth and friendship.
illustration.alt: Yuki feeling proud and happy as she shares Pepper with her new classmates in a circle

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Yuki felt scared on her first day at the new school. She had nervous butterflies in her tummy!

questions.question: What was the rabbit's name?
questions.explanation: The class rabbit's name was Pepper, and he was hiding behind his water bowl when Yuki first saw him.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel when holding Pepper?
questions.explanation: When Yuki held Pepper, she felt brave! Having a friend helped her feel more confident.

questions.question: What did the other children want to do with Pepper?
questions.explanation: Marcus and Aria wanted to pet Pepper too because he was so soft and friendly.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Yuki felt _____ on her first day at school. But when she met Pepper the rabbit, she felt _____.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Pepper was a _____ rabbit who liked to hide. When Yuki was _____ with him, the other children wanted to pet Pepper too.
